content: The 2025 configurable ICM intrinsic curiosity mechanism for swarm UAVs can be integrated with the ReAct + Reflexion reasoning framework to generate self-directed, curiosity-driven long-horizon mission planning for drone swarms, where ICM rewards agents for exploring uncertain, uncharted airspace while ReAct and Reflexion structure incremental reasoning to turn unexpected discoveries into adaptive mission adjustments.
source_topics: agent planning reasoning frameworks ReAct Reflexion
